key_items: Bitcoin bulls eye fresh positions after BTC price drops under $71K -- early bullish positioning in BTC derivatives may signal recovery start
Mystery whale paid $30M to exit BlackRock Bitcoin ETF before market fell -- largest single off-exchange trade in US spot Bitcoin ETF history
CME Group launches 24/7 crypto futures and options with Bitcoin volatility contracts -- institutional infrastructure expansion
reasoning: Bitcoin is caught between institutional accumulation signals (Bitmine's $52M ETH buy, Strive's $4.2B Bitcoin war chest, derivative positioning) and concerning smart money exits (BlackRock ETF whale selling $1.26B position preemptively). The market shows mixed conviction with price rejected at $71K and early technical recovery attempts offset by regulatory uncertainty and macroeconomic headwinds versus equities.
risks: Analyst forecasts of Bitcoin dropping below $61K combined with the well-timed institutional exit before recent selloff suggests informed money is rotating out ahead of further downside in the 1-7 day window.
